# Sequential Decision Strategies

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Basic concepts of reinforcement learning

_To be added._

## Statistical reinforcement learning

_To be added._

## Time-varying treatments and confounding

_To be added._

## Computational reinforcement learning

_To be added._

## Causal reinforcement learning

_To be added._

## Policy evaluation

_To be added._

## Limitations

_To be added._
